title: memstead-plugin/v0 projection
description: A Projection is the obligation that maps source facets (and optional read-only reference vaults) to a single destination vault. Each projection file lives at `.memstead/projections/<vault>/<name>.json`. `source_facets` reference facets by name under the projection's own vault; `reference_vaults` supply cross-vault context; `destination_vault` is the vault the projection writes into. The optional `rules` block carries free-form prose guidance the agent reads when running this projection. (The legacy `sources`/`destinations` folder shape was retired with the four-primitive migration.)

intent.description: Optional short statement of what this projection produces.

source_facets.description: Facets (by name, resolved under the projection's own vault) the projection reads from.

reference_vaults.description: Read-only reference vaults (by name) that supply cross-vault context.

destination_vault.description: The vault this projection writes into.

rules.description: Optional prose guidance for the agent — free-form object.
